summary: There's a case for the Federal Reserve to "hike right now,'' and even if policymakers aren't ready yet, the bar to action is definitely getting lower, according to Collin Martin at the Schwab Center for Financial Research. He speaks with Jonathan Ferro and Annmarie Hordern on Bloomberg Television's "Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Rebound From Selloff as Nvidia Leads Big-Tech Gains

summary: Southwest Airlines Chief Operating Officer Andrew Watterson says business travel has remained “incredibly strong” despite higher costs related to the War in Iran. He speaks with Lisa Abramowicz on the sidelines of the IATA Conference in Brazil. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe’s Imports of Diesel and Jet Fuel Shrivel as War Drags On
title_cn: 随着战争的持续，欧洲柴油和航空燃料的进口减少
summary: Europe’s imports of diesel and jet fuel stagnated for a second month in May, piling pressure on regional energy supplies as the Iran war grinds on.

title: SpaceX Set for Historic IPO This Week
title_cn: SpaceX 将于本周进行历史性 IPO
summary: Elon Musk wants to build the infrastructure for AI in space — and he's asking investors to help pay for it. The rocket, satellite and now AI company wants to raise around 75 billion dollars in what could become the largest IPO in history, funding everything from its Starship rocket to AI computing power and future data centers in orbit. Bloomberg Tech's Ed Ludlow takes a look at what's at stake. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Faces Rising Rate Hike Expectations, Schwab Center's Martin Says
title_cn: 施瓦布中心的马丁表示，美联储面临加息预期
summary: The bar for a Federal Reserve rate hike is falling as the job market remains robust in the face of stubborn price pressures, according to Collin Martin at the Schwab Center for Financial Research.

title: Chile’s Tren de Aragua Probe Revives Bank Secrecy Debate
title_cn: 智利特伦德阿拉瓜调查再次引发银行保密争论
summary: The June arrests of bank employees accused of ties to Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua criminal organization has reignited debate over Chile’s financial secrecy rules, which are among the strictest in the world.

title: Tate & Lyle Accepts Bid From Ingredion in Loss for London

summary: Israel’s shekel has swung from the world’s best performer to the worst in a matter of days, easing pressure on the central bank to stem a 14-month rally that’s hurting the country’s exporters.

summary: US President Donald Trump said Israel and Iran are looking to agree to an immediate ceasefire following a series of strikes, while Iran’s central military command says the military operation against Israel has ended, according to semi-official Fars news agency. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Can't Young People Find Jobs?
title_cn: 年轻人为何找不到工作？
summary: For recent college graduates, the unemployment rate is reaching recession levels. But you shouldn’t blame AI, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist and economist Allison Schrager. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Preps for the SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 华尔街为 SpaceX IPO 做准备
summary: SpaceX is heading for the biggest IPO ever. Bloomberg’s Bailey Lipschultz and Sridhar Natarajan join Bloomberg Open Interest to break down how Wall Street is preparing for the historic debut. Demand is already huge, but the real question is whether SpaceX’s massive offering helps reopen the IPO market, or just makes it even harder for everyone else. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Alphabet's Google placed an order with Intel to manufacture more than 3 million of its specialized AI chips in 2028, the Information reported, citing two unnamed sources. Anurag Rana has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

summary:
Brain-computer interfaces could dramatically alter how humans interact with technology. Startups around the world are racing to get their devices approved for commercial use. China may be in the lead.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: President Donald Trump’s administration urged NATO allies to channel defense spending toward efforts to replace components from China’s Huawei Technologies Co. in their networks and critical infrastructure, according to people familiar with the matter.

summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Lindsay Rosner, Goldman Sachs Asset Management Head of Multi-Sector Investing; Euan Blair, Multiverse CEO & Founder; Kanishka Narayan, UK AI & Online Safety Minister (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has set up a waitlist for customers interested in riding in a robotaxi in London, ahead of a planned commercial debut in the UK this year.

title_cn: 清洁技术风险投资者面临资金集中风险

summary: The information sector is dominant in profit expansion — and one of the worst places to find work.

title: Too Early for Rotation Into Europe Stocks: State Street
title_cn: 转向欧洲股票还为时过早：道富银行
summary: Marija Veitmane, equity research head at State Street Global Markets, discusses the artificial intelligence trade and how Middle East peace prospects impact European stocks. While an end to war and lower energy costs would benefit Europe, "it needs to come with a cyclical earnings recovery and we're just not there yet," Veitmane says on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Drahi Reaches €20 Billion Deal to Sell French Phone Carrier SFR
title_cn: Drahi 达成 200 亿欧元出售法国电话运营商 SFR 的协议
summary: Billionaire Patrick Drahi has reached an agreement to sell French mobile carrier SFR to a consortium of rival telecommunications firms, in a deal that values the company €20.4 billion ($23.5 billion) and will test regulators’ tolerance for consolidation.

title: HSBC CEO Says Bank Still Needs Human Judgment in AI Era
title_cn: 汇丰银行首席执行官表示，人工智能时代银行仍需要人类判断
summary: HSBC Chief Executive Officer Georges Elhedery says that while certain roles will be displaced by artificial intelligence, the productivity gains can be reinvested. "I would like to be able to accelerate and bring forward a lot of the ambitious deliverables we have for the future," Elhedery tells Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua. "That requires investment, and that is job creation." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HSBC CEO Says ‘Human Judgment’ Is Vital Even as AI Introduced
title_cn: 汇丰银行首席执行官表示，即使引入人工智能，“人类判断”也至关重要
summary: HSBC Holdings Plc Chief Executive Officer Georges Elhedery said people will remain central to banks even as artificial intelligence becomes widespread, offering reassurance to employees after recent CEO comments raised concerns about the industry’s future.

title: Arcmont, Ares Lead €1.1 Billion Loan to Software Firm Cegid
title_cn: Arcmont、Ares 向软件公司 Cegid 提供 11 亿欧元贷款
summary: A group of high-profile private credit firms are lending €1.1 billion ($1.3 billion) to French business software firm Cegid, in a show of confidence in a sector that’s been rattled by an AI-induced selloff.

title: Goldman-Backed Go Prices Japan’s Biggest 2026 IPO at Upper End
title_cn: 高盛支持的日本 2026 年最大 IPO 定价处于较高水平
summary: Japan’s most popular taxi-hailing app provider Go Inc. priced its initial public offering at the upper end of the marketed range, showing investor appetite for Japan’s biggest listing so far this year.

title: Korea’s Lee Marks First Year With Vow to Find New Growth Engines
title_cn: 韩国李在镕庆祝第一年誓言寻找新的增长引擎
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung vowed to ramp up investment for a range of future growth engines and to leverage excess tax revenue generated by the surging semiconductor industry for the wider good.

title: India Seeks Protection From Future Trade Probes in US Deal
title_cn: 印度在美国协议中寻求保护免受未来贸易调查
summary: India has sought assurance from the US that it will not face any investigations under Section 301 once a trade agreement is signed between the two nations, according to an official from the South Asian country.

title: Iran Halts Latest Israel Strikes, Trump Urges Ceasefire
title_cn: 伊朗停止以色列最新打击，特朗普敦促停火
summary:
Iran declared an end to its latest strikes against Israel, after tit-for-tat attacks that prompted President Donald Trump to call for a halt to fighting.

The escalation followed renewed fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon, which remains a sticking point in peace negotiations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: LA Mayor Race Flips as Socialist Beats Reality TV Star Pratt
title_cn: 社会主义者击败真人秀明星普拉特，洛杉矶市长竞选发生逆转
summary: Democratic incumbent Mayor Karen Bass and Democratic City Councilmember Nithya Raman will advance to the runoff in November for Los Angeles mayor, Decision Desk HQ projects.

title: Trump Border Chief Vows New York ICE Surge, Says ‘It’s Coming’
title_cn: 特朗普边境局长誓言纽约 ICE 激增，称“它即将到来”
summary: The Trump administration has drawn up a plan to surge US Immigration and Customs Enforcement personnel to New York City, a move that threatens to escalate tensions with New York Governor Kathy Hochul over the president’s migrant crackdown.

title: Peru Vote Is Too Close to Call as Fujimori’s Lead Narrows
title_cn: 秘鲁投票结果势均力敌，藤森领先优势缩小
summary: Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election remained too close to call as conservative Keiko Fujimori’s razor-thin lead over leftist candidate Roberto Sánchez narrowed with votes still being counted.

title: Xi Pledges Deeper Ties With Kim While Avoiding Nuclear Issue
title_cn: 习近平承诺与金正恩深化关系，同时避免核问题
summary: President Xi Jinping vowed to expand China’s trade, agriculture and technology cooperation with North Korea, while avoiding public mentions of its neighbor’s nuclear program in a meeting with Kim Jong Un in Pyongyang.

title: US Allies Seek Trump’s Approval of Hormuz Demining Mission
title_cn: 美国盟友寻求特朗普批准霍尔木兹排雷任务
summary: US allies will seek President Donald Trump’s approval for a Europe-led plan to demine the Strait of Hormuz at next week’s Group of Seven summit in France.

title: Democrats Have a Conundrum in Maine Primary
title_cn: 民主党在缅因州初选遇到难题
summary: Graham Platner shows the risk of backing a complete unknown

title: Trump Says Iran Blockade Remains, Demands an End to Shooting
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗封锁依然存在，要求停止枪击
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would maintain its blockade of Iranian ports until there is a deal to end hostilities in the region after demanding Israel and Iran stop military action.

title: Trump’s Economy Polling Slides as Iran War Saps His Superpower
title_cn: 伊朗战争削弱了特朗普的超级大国，他的经济民调下滑
summary: President Donald Trump is barreling toward the midterm elections with a vulnerability that’s something new in his political life: Voters are losing faith in the Trump economy.

title: India Opposition Leaders Meet to Project Unity After Poll Losses
title_cn: 印度反对派领导人在民意调查失败后开会表达团结
summary: Leaders of India’s top opposition parties met in New Delhi in an effort to project unity, their first major gathering since the May state elections, which dealt significant blows to several regional parties.

title: Orban-Era Graft Cost Hungary $194 Billion, Watchdog Says
title_cn: 监管机构称，欧尔班时代的贪污腐败使匈牙利损失了 1,940 亿美元
summary: Entrenched corruption under former Hungarian leader Viktor Orban likely cost Hungary about 60 trillion forint ($194 billion) over the past 16 years, according to the head of the country’s anti-graft agency.

title: Pope Urges Justice for Clergy Abuse Victims During Spain Visit
title_cn: 教皇访问西班牙期间敦促为神职人员虐待受害者伸张正义
summary: Pope Leo XIV called for justice for victims of sexual abuse by Catholic clergy during a trip to Spain, where he plans to meet with those who have suffered.

title: Singapore’s PM Warns Full Impact of Mideast Conflict Yet to Come
title_cn: 新加坡总理警告中东冲突的全面影响尚未到来
summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong warned that the economy has yet to feel the full impact of the Middle East conflict, and uncertainty remains over the growth outlook despite a strong performance in the first quarter.

title: Nigeria Plans Five Repatriation Flights From South Africa
title_cn: 尼日利亚计划从南非起飞五架遣返航班
summary: Nigeria will begin repatriating its citizens from South Africa this week, after anti-immigrant attacks and protests in the continent’s biggest economy.

title: France Faces New Era of Slumping Births and Demographic Decline
title_cn: 法国面临出生率下降和人口下降的新时代
summary: France’s population is on course for rapid decline and aging that will further weigh on an economy already struggling with slowing growth and a rising debt mountain.

title: A World Cup Full of Geopolitical Tension Is Almost Upon Us
title_cn: 充满地缘政治紧张局势的世界杯即将来临
summary: Iran playing in a competition co-hosted by the US is just one of the flashpoints to watch for.

title: Russia Party’s ‘Women’s Manifesto’ Blasts Its Alpha-Male Culture
title_cn: 俄罗斯党的“妇女宣言”抨击其阿尔法男性文化
summary: Long before he started Europe’s worst war in 80 years, President Vladimir Putin fostered a macho political culture in Russia with stunts such as riding shirtless on horseback and shooting a Siberian tiger with a tranquilizer gun.

title: NATO Jets Shoot Down a Drone That Flew Into Latvian Airspace
title_cn: 北约喷气机击落一架飞入拉脱维亚领空的无人机
summary: NATO jets shot down a drone that flew into Latvia’s eastern airspace, the defense ministry said on Monday, in the Baltic region’s second such move in as many months.

title: Houthis to Impose ‘Complete Ban’ on Israeli Ships in Red Sea
title_cn: 胡塞武装将对以色列船只实施红海“全面禁令”
summary: The Houthis, an Iran-backed militant group that controls much of Yemen, declared a ban on Israeli ships in the Red Sea, threatening a key bypass route to the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Indonesia Has No Cabinet Reshuffle Plan for Now, Official Says
title_cn: 官员称印尼目前没有内阁改组计划
summary: Indonesia has no plan to revamp its cabinet as of now, Minister of State Secretary Prasetyo Hadi said on Monday.

title: US Pushes Iran Rebuke Over Uranium Missing Since Bombings Began
title_cn: 美国谴责伊朗自爆炸开始以来失踪的铀
summary: The US is moving to censure Iran at the United Nations atomic watchdog, escalating diplomatic pressure on the Islamic Republic over its nuclear activity as their ceasefire is seriously tested by fresh attacks involving Israel.

title: Netherlands Expands Investment Screening Rules for AI, Biotech
title_cn: 荷兰扩大人工智能、生物技术投资审查规则
summary: The Dutch government will expand its investment-screening regime to cover six additional technologies, including artificial intelligence, in a bid to better protect knowledge deemed critical to national security.

title: Cambodia Scam Centers Thrive Despite Crackdown, Amnesty Says
title_cn: 国际特赦组织称，柬埔寨诈骗中心尽管受到打击，但仍蓬勃发展
summary: Cambodia has failed to dismantle much of its online scam industry despite a yearlong crackdown that authorities said would eliminate the scourge, according to an Amnesty International report that challenges official claims of success.

title: Founders Forum Group CEO Dawson on Bloomberg TV
title_cn: 创始人论坛集团首席执行官道森接受彭博电视台采访
summary: Founders Forum Group CEO Carolyn Dawson speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie to kick off a big week of tech events in London. She joined Bloomberg Daybreak Europe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel and Iran Trade Missile Attacks, Jeopardizing Peace Talks | Daybreak Europe 06/08/2026
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗进行导弹袭击，危及和平谈判欧洲黎明 06/08/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Stocks and bonds dropped as investors faced a trio of headwinds with a pullback in the artificial-intelligence trade, mounting bets on a US interest rate hike and rising oil prices due to a worsening of the Middle East conflict.

Israel and Iran exchanged missile strikes on Monday despite President Donald Trump’s calls for both sides to halt the fighting and give peace talks a chance to succeed.

And Intesa Sanpaolo offered to buy Monte dei Paschi for €30.6 billion ($35.3 billion) in a move that’s set to spur a new phase of dealmaking in Italian finance.

Today's guest: Lauren van Biljon, Allspring Global Investments, Senior Portfolio Manager (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pashinyan Wins Third Term as Armenia Backs Shift Toward West
title_cn: 亚美尼亚支持向西方转移，帕希尼扬赢得第三个任期
summary: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan claimed victory in parliamentary elections as voters overwhelmingly backed the South Caucasus country’s turn toward the West and away from Russia.

title: Iran Ends Latest Strikes on Israel as Trump Urges Peace
title_cn: 特朗普敦促和平，伊朗结束对以色列的最新打击
summary: Emergency services examine a fragment of an intercepted Iranian missile in northern Israel, on June 7. Photographer: Rami Shlush/AP Photo

title: Kosovo Remains in Deadlock as PM Wins Third Election in Row
title_cn: 科索沃仍陷入僵局，总理连续第三次赢得选举
summary: Kosovo Prime Minister Albin Kurti won a third election in a row while failing to secure an outright majority in parliament, raising questions about how he plans to break a political deadlock that has paralyzed the country’s fragmented politics for 18 months.
